# What's in it?

> Free, ad-financed German GitHub Repository Intelligence & Knowledge Hub.
> No accounts, no paywall. Repo analysis via OpenRouter (Gemini) on cache miss only;
> static Git/GitHub knowledge and Weekly Top 10 never call an LLM.

## Context
- [PRD (source of truth)](docs/prd/whats-in-it-live-ready-full.prd.md)
- [Agent rules](AGENTS.md)
- [Implementation notes](CLAUDE.md)
- [Architecture](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)

## Key routes
- `/` repository URL input + Weekly Top 10
- `/analyse/[owner]/[repo]` cached/new analysis
- `/github` Git & GitHub knowledge hub
- `/github/shortcuts`, `/github/commands`, `/github/cli`, `/github/actions`, `/github/[slug]`

## Rules
- Cache before OpenRouter. One LLM call per repo_key under concurrency.
- No raw LLM HTML. Secrets server-side only.
